etymology.description: 匃(匃) (gài, "lack") + 曰(日) (yuē, "say") = phonetic 匃 with semantic meaning of 曰
etymology.interpretation: The character 曷(hē) combines 匃(匃) (gài, "lack") as the phonetic component with 曰(日) (yuē, "say") as the semantic element, suggesting an association with speech or expression.
